text:
Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 HEPVIRAL_MEDICARE_EVER Hepatitis (Any Viral) - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HEPVIRAL_MEDICAID_EVER Hepatitis (Any Viral) - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HEPVIRAL_COMBINED_EVER Hepatitis (Any Viral) - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HEPA_MEDICAID_EVER
